description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GcodeAnalyzer that runs on push to specific paths and branches, and on pull requests to specific branches and tags. The workflow checks if the actor is a bot or if the pull request is from a fork, and if not, it proceeds with a series of jobs. First, it checks out code and sets up the environment. Then, it uses a Conan recipe version job to get the recipe ID. Next, it runs the GCodeAnalyzer on the engine with multiple steps, including checking out CuraEngine, GCodeAnalyzer, and test models, setting up Python, installing dependencies, building CuraEngine, and analyzing generated GCode files.
